texto: Chemistry itself knows altogether too well that - given the real fear that the scarcity of global resources and energy might threaten the unity of mankind - chemistry is in a position to make a contribution towards securing a true peace on earth.
explicacao: Citação de Kenichi Fukui sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Chemistry itself knows altogether too well that - given the real fear that the scarcity of global…” articula autoestima, paz, unity em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como unity e earth.
